channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1980] stack overran on mds when use zfs on ost
item.description:
Run compilebench on lab's VM with USE_OFD=yes, OSTFSTYPE=zfs

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == parallel-scale test compilebench: compilebench == 21:26:31 (1348028791)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == parallel-scale test compilebench: compilebench == 21:26:31 (1348028791)
Lustre: ctl-lustre-MDT0000: super-sequence allocation rc = 0 [0x0000000200000400-0x0000000240000400):0:mdt
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark .\/compilebench -D \/mnt\/lustre\/d0.compilebench -i 4 -r 4 --makej
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ./compilebench -D /mnt/lustre/d0.compilebench -i 4 -r 4 --makej
[root@client-12vm3 ~]#
[root@client-12vm3 ~]#
[root@client-12vm3 ~]#
[root@client-12vm3 ~]# uptime
22:45:30 up 1:23, 1 user, load average: 0.00, 0.00, 0.00
[root@client-12vm3 ~]# BUG: unable to handle kernel paging request at 0000000000019288
IP: [<ffffffff8105422c>] update_curr+0x14c/0x1f0
PGD 70b7c067 PUD 70b7d067 PMD 0
Thread overran stack, or stack corrupted
Oops: 0002 1 SMP
last sysfs file: /sys/devices/pci0000:00/0000:00:01.2/usb1/speed
CPU 0
Modules linked in: lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) osd_zfs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core zfs(P)(U) zcommon(P)(U) znvpair(P)(U) zavl(P)(U) zunicode(P)(U) spl(U) zlib_deflate microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]

Pid: 4524, comm: mdt00_003 Tainted: P --------------- 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
RIP: 0010:[<ffffffff8105422c>] [<ffffffff8105422c>] update_curr+0x14c/0x1f0

RAX: ffff880037458ae0 RBX: ffffffffffff8800 RCX: ffff88007faa60c0

<d> 0000000000000000 0000000000000000 ffff880002203e18 ffffffff810547db
<d> ffff8800022166c0 0000000000000000 00000000000166c0 0000000000000000

<IRQ>
[<ffffffff810547db>] task_tick_fair+0xdb/0x160
BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 00000000000009e8

PGD 70b7c067 PUD 70b7d067 PMD 0
Thread overran stack, or stack corrupted
Oops: 0000 2 SMP
last sysfs file: /sys/devices/pci0000:00/0000:00:01.2/usb1/speed
CPU 0

item.summary: stack overran on mds when use zfs on ost

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
